title: Converting SQL Server code to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates using Gemini to convert SQL Server T-SQL code to PostgreSQL. Gemini provides both code translation and explanations for data type conversions like IDENTITY and BIT, helping developers learn PostgreSQL through guided examples.
writeup: The video demonstrates using Gemini to convert SQL Server T-SQL code into PostgreSQL. Beyond producing the translated code, Gemini explains data type conversions such as IDENTITY and BIT, framing the migration as a guided learning exercise. The takeaway: Gemini handles both the code generation and the accompanying explanations, which helps developers understand PostgreSQL conventions while completing a database migration.
